Pass Criteria: All collections and object names follow manifest exactly. No stray nucleus objects outside hierarchy.

Outer membrane, inner membrane, perinuclear lumen, and cutaway rims are all visible.

NPCs are protein complexes with rings, lobes, gates, filaments/baskets on hero pores.
Gold lamina lies beneath inner membrane and anchors peripheral chromatin.

Interphase chromatin and condensed chromosomes are separate states; DNA never exits the nucleus.
Nucleolus is non-membrane, bumpy, subregioned, and able to fade/reform in mitosis.
Protein import and RNA/ribosomal export use NPC paths in opposite directions.
Outer membrane visibly connects to rough ER and perinuclear lumen continuity is shown.
Breakdown and reassembly can be understood using panels, fragments, chromosomes, and target sockets.
Meshes are separate, origins sensible, surfaces thick enough, triangle budget recorded, materials portable.
Model has high-quality depth, texture, shadows, bevels, and readable stylized realism.
